inputs.label: Monthly Essential Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Total essential monthly living expenses (e.g., housing, food, utilities, transportation, insurance).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total essential monthly living expenses (e.g., housing, food, utilities, transportation, insurance).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aylık temel yaşam giderleri toplamı (örneğin, konut, gıda, faturalar, ulaşım, sigorta).

inputs.label: Desired Coverage (Months)
inputs.businessContext: Number of months of expenses the emergency fund should cover (typically 3-6).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of months of expenses the emergency fund should cover (typically 3-6).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Acil durum fonunun karşılaması gereken ay sayısı (genellikle 3-6).

inputs.label: Current Emergency Savings
inputs.businessContext: Amount already saved toward the emergency fund.

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount already saved toward the emergency fund.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Acil durum fonu için halihazırda biriktirilen miktar.

inputs.label: Safety Margin (%)
inputs.businessContext: Additional percentage buffer for unforeseen costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional percentage buffer for unforeseen costs.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Öngörülemeyen maliyetler için ek yüzde tamponu.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
